_comment: Weekly snapshots of the OPEN CommitFest, used to compute week-over-week deltas. One object per ISO week (Monday date). Populated by the weekly-dbms-digest skill from the per-CF activity log.

weeks.note: First tracked week (baseline). Flow computed from the per-CF activity log /59/activity/; absolute total not captured (full list page skipped to save tokens). Week-over-week total deltas begin next run.

created.title: Fix PL/Python crash when a SRF is redefined mid-execution
pg_dump: skip pg_init_privs entries for non-existent roles
Fix out of bound access on embedded null token
Tighten pg_uhc_verifychar() to enforce CP949 lead/trail byte ranges

closed.title: Fix PL/Python crash when a SRF is redefined mid-execution
Fix pg_restore --no-globals SQL output for pg_dumpall archives

weeks.note_window: Activity log covered Jun 18-21 in the page fetched; earlier in-window days (Jun 15-17) not enumerated this run.

weeks.note: Regenerated 2026-06-29. commitfest.postgresql.org was entirely unreachable this run: the session egress was restricted to a GitHub-only network policy, so WebFetch/curl to the CF app (and the activity log /59/activity/) returned a proxy CONNECT 403. No fresh window flow computed; deliberately not fabricated. queue_snapshot below is carried from the prior run's cached view, was NOT re-fetched, and is NOT window-scoped (unverified for this week). Partial in-window development pulse available from the postgres git master log instead (~30 commits Jun 22-28; several close open CF entries).
